title: Turbine Deep Dive — Engineering
description: Single turbine analysis: trends, power curve, and alarm history. Like a SCADA engineering workstation.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "scada")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.turbine_id == "${turbine_id}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor == "PowerOutput")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "scada")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.turbine_id == "${turbine_id}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor == "WindSpeed")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "scada")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.turbine_id == "${turbine_id}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor == "NacelleTemp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "scada")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.turbine_id == "${turbine_id}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor == "Vibration")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "scada")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.turbine_id == "${turbine_id}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor == "RotorRPM" or r.sensor == "PitchAngle")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Power Curve — Wind Speed vs Power Output
panels.description: Scatter plot: each dot is one reading. Deviations from the expected curve indicate faults.

targets.query:
wind = from(bucket: "scada")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.turbine_id == "${turbine_id}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor == "WindSpeed")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "wind_speed"})

power = from(bucket: "scada")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.turbine_id == "${turbine_id}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sensor == "PowerOutput")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "power_output"})

join(tables: {wind: wind, power: power}, on: ["_time"])

from(bucket: "scada")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "alerts")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.turbine_id == "${turbine_id}")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 50)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "alert_type", "severity", "_value"])
